message:
fix(openai): send empty string content instead of omitting field for assistant messages

When converting assistant messages, send an explicit empty string
(Some(OpenAIContent::Text(Cow::Borrowed("")))) instead of omitting
the content field entirely. This fixes compatibility with
OpenAI-compatible providers (e.g., GLM via Ollama Cloud) that reject
assistant messages with a missing content field, returning validation
errors instead of proceeding with the conversation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
